top_signals.title: The Evolution of Ukraine’s Asymmetrical Combat Tactics
top_signals.summary:
In 2022, Scott Sweetow wrote, “Of Roadside Bombs and Drones: Putin’s Looming Insurgency Problem,” where he argued Ukraine’s fight against Russia would rely on a combination of conventional and asymmetrical insurgent tactics. Four years of combat later, we asked Scott to revisit his arguments.Image: National Information Warfare Center PacificIn your 2022 article, you argued that Ukraine’s tech-driven resistance could rapidly evolve into an insurgency-style force. Four years in, how have those assessments held up? Could one argue that Ukraine today operates more like an insurgency in some respects than a conventional state military? Classic insurgencies pit asymmetric or guerrilla forces against organized,

The post The Evolution of Ukraine’s Asymmetrical Combat Tactics appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.title: Oil Swings in Thin Trade as US Threatens Key Iranian Export Hub
top_signals.summary: Oil flipped between gains and losses in thin trading as traders weighed US President Donald Trump’s threats to step up attacks on key Iranian energy infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Changes to collateral eligibility in the Sterling Monetary Framework - Market Notice 11 June 2026
top_signals.summary: This Market Notice covers changes to the Bank’s collateral eligibility framework for the Sterling Monetary Framework (SMF).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The ‘new joule order’ is here. The west is last to realise
top_signals.summary: Electrification is the purchase of optionality and China bought more of it than any nation in history

top_signals.title: What Will Be The Legacy of the 2026 World Cup?
top_signals.summary: What is the legacy of the 2026 World Cup: expensive tickets or finally growing soccer in the US? On this week's episode of The Deal, Jason Kelly and Alex Rodriguez asked The Athletic's Henry Bushnell if ticket prices will ultimately drown out everything else. Listen to the full interview wherever you get your podcasts. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Pact on Migration and Asylum enters into application on 12 June
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 11 Jun 2026 Tomorrow, 12 June 2026, the Pact on Migration and Asylum will start to apply in all EU Member States.
